negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_172
prompt: A man practices karate in a bright, open room with large, grid-patterned windows allowing natural light to illuminate the space. The floor is smooth, light-colored concrete, and the plain white walls create a minimalist backdrop that highlights his movements. The man, dressed in a traditional white karate gi with a black belt, stands barefoot and performs a series of techniques. He starts in a focused stance, bringing his hands together before executing a controlled punch. He follows up with a high kick, lifting his leg before smoothly returning to his stance. His movements are precise and deliberate, demonstrating his skill. The sunlight casts long shadows across the floor, emphasizing the dynamic motion. By the final frame, the man is in an upright stance, maintaining focus and control, ready to continue his practice.
